title: tenants — scheduled tasks
description: Cron entries registered via `Schedule::command()` and `Schedule::job()` in `TenancyServiceProvider::schedule()`. All times UTC. `runOnOneServer` set on every job so multi-node worker pools do not double-execute. `withoutOverlapping` set where the job window may exceed the interval.

entries.description: Daily 03:00 UTC. Enumerates archived tenants past the 30d retention window and dispatches HardDeleteArchivedTenantJob for each. Respects `retention.json` — tenants marked `is_system=true` are skipped.
Hourly. Reverifies every Domain whose `verified_at` is stale (last_check_at older than 24h) or whose `ssl_expires_at` is within 30 days. Dispatches VerifyDomainDnsJob for each.
Weekly Sunday 04:00 UTC. Snapshots `subprocessors.json` state to the compliance store (GDPR Art. 28 evidence). No-op if unchanged.
Every 15 minutes. Enumerates active TenantIntegrations whose `next_sync_at <= now` and dispatches SyncTenantIntegrationJob for each. v2 — no-op in v1 until integrations ship.
